THE COURT AND PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL CONFER ON THE STATUS OF NON-ANSWERING DEFENDANTS. THE COURT ORDERED THIS CASE TO JOIN OTHER CASES IN CLAPPER GROUP 38.
